perf_hint: each pixel replays the blips still on screen — a handful at most — so frame time is dominated by the resolution

params.name: line
params.description: How high the trace sits above the bottom of the frame.

params.name: travel
params.description: How fast a blip crosses the frame, in frame widths per second.

params.name: fade
params.description: How quickly a blip shrinks as it travels.

params.name: spike
params.description: How tall a fresh blip is, as a fraction of the frame.

params.name: thickness
params.description: How thick the trace's hot core is, as a fraction of the frame.

params.name: tremor
params.description: How much spectral flux shivers the baseline between blips.

params.name: tint
params.description: Where on the palette the trace's light sits.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the loudness of the song puts into the trace.
